summary: Experimental report from VectorBuilder documenting AAV9 vector production, transduction testing, Western blot analysis, and RNA extraction from Calu-6 lung cancer cells. Compares large-scale vs ultra-purified AAV9 preparations for delivering p53-related constructs at MOI=5E+6, with quantitative Ct values showing 27-130x reduction in tRNA delivery with ultra-purified vectors.

content_blocks.title: Title Page
content_blocks.content: Customized AAV production and transduction test with Calu-6 cell line (RNA extraction and Western Blot). Project IDs: S250613-1039jjn/P250610-1004gsu. Date: 2025/8/14. Contractor: VectorBuilder.

content_blocks.title: Materials - Cell Line and Experimental Setup
content_blocks.content: Cell line: Calu-6 from ATCC, passage 3. Transduction format: 24-well plates and 6-well plates. Cell numbers: 3E+4 cells (24-well) or 8E+4 cells (6-well). MOI=5E+6 for all conditions.

content_blocks.title: Materials - Virus List
content_blocks.content: Six AAV9 constructs tested: (1) AAV9L(VB240514-1548ggn), Lot 250617AAVM01, 2.06E+12 GC/ml; (2) AAV9MP(VB240514-1548ggn), Lot 250618AAVY17, 1.54E+13 GC/ml; (3) AAV9MP(VB250610-1157tpv), Lot 250702AAVP15, 5.39E+12 GC/ml; (4) AAV9MP(VB250610-1162rmu), Lot 250703AAVN13, 1.00E+13 GC/ml; (5) AAV9L(VB250610-1162rmu), Lot 250702AAVU01, 2.38E+12 GC/ml; (6) AAV9L(VB250610-1157tpv), Lot 250712AAVW01, 3.47E+12 GC/ml. Note: L=large-scale, MP=ultra-purified medium scale.

content_blocks.title: Protocol - Western Blot Parameters
content_blocks.content: Harvest time: 72h post-transduction. Cell lysis: 100ul RIPA buffer per 24-well. Sample treatment: Ultrasonic disruption plus 95°C for 10 min. Protein loaded: 10ug per lane. SDS-PAGE: 80V for 30min then 125V for 1h. Transfer: 250mA for 60min. Primary antibody (anti-p53): overnight at 4°C. Secondary antibody: 1h at room temperature. Loading control: anti-GAPDH.

content_blocks.title: Protocol - RNA Extraction
content_blocks.content: Harvest time: 72h post-transduction from 6-well plates at MOI=5E+6. Method: TRIzol reagent (Invitrogen 15596026) following manufacturer's protocol.

content_blocks.title: Brightfield Microscopy Images
content_blocks.content: Microscopy images (10ms exposure) of Calu-6 cells 72h post-transduction showing: AAV9L(VB240514-1548ggn), AAV9MP(VB240514-1548ggn), AAV9L(VB250610-1157tpv), AAV9MP(VB250610-1157tpv), AAV9L(VB250610-1162rmu), AAV9MP(VB250610-1162rmu), plus Calu6 WT and G418-treated (2000ug/ml) controls. Key observation: Cells transduced with non-purified virus (AAV9L) showed more cell debris than those transduced with ultra-purified virus (AAV9MP).

content_blocks.title: Western Blot Results - Vector 1 and Vector 2 (VB250610-1157tpv)
content_blocks.content: Western blot with anti-p53 (50kDa, 45s exposure) and anti-GAPDH (35kDa, 10s exposure). Lanes: M=marker, 1-2=AAV9L VB240514-1548ggn duplicates, 3-4=AAV9MP VB240514-1548ggn duplicates, 5-6=AAV9L VB250610-1157tpv duplicates, 7-8=AAV9MP VB250610-1157tpv duplicates, 9=G418 control (2000ug/ml), 10=positive control, 11-12=Calu6 WT duplicates. Strong p53 bands visible in large-scale preparations (lanes 1-2, 5-6); weaker or no bands in ultra-purified preparations (lanes 3-4, 7-8). GAPDH loading control present in all lanes.

content_blocks.title: RNA Extraction Data - Vector 1 and Vector 2 (VB250610-1157tpv)
content_blocks.content: RNA Ct values by Arraystar: VB240514-1548ggn large-scale (166 ng/ul, 50ul): Ct=10.078; duplicate (129 ng/ul): Ct=10.090. VB240514-1548ggn ultra-purified (303 ng/ul): Ct=17.786; duplicate (325 ng/ul): Ct=16.425. VB250610-1157tpv large-scale (162 ng/ul): Ct=12.396; duplicate (236 ng/ul): Ct=12.978. VB250610-1157tpv ultra-purified (226 ng/ul): Ct=18.138; duplicate (340 ng/ul): Ct=16.733.

content_blocks.title: Western Blot Results - Vector 2 (VB250610-1162rmu)
content_blocks.content: Western blot with anti-p53 (50kDa, 45s exposure) and anti-GAPDH (35kDa, 10s exposure). Lanes: M=marker, 1-2=Calu6 WT duplicates, 3-4=AAV9L VB250610-1162rmu duplicates, 5-6=AAV9MP VB250610-1162rmu duplicates, 7=G418 control (2000ug/ml), 8=positive control. Strong p53 bands in large-scale preparations (lanes 3-4); minimal or no p53 signal in ultra-purified preparations (lanes 5-6). GAPDH present in all lanes.

content_blocks.title: RNA Extraction Data - Vector 2 (VB250610-1162rmu)
content_blocks.content: RNA Ct values: VB250610-1162rmu large-scale (214 ng/ul, 50ul): Ct=11.517; duplicate (216 ng/ul): Ct=10.611. VB250610-1162rmu ultra-purified (257 ng/ul): Ct=17.092; duplicate (411 ng/ul): Ct=17.567.

content_blocks.title: Quantitative Analysis - Raw Ct Values Grouped by Vector and Purification Type
content_blocks.content: Bar graph showing Ct values (y-axis 0-25) for three vectors comparing large-scale vs ultra-purified preparations. VB240514-1548ggn: Large-scale Ct=10.08, Ultra-purified Ct=17.11, ΔCt=7.02. VB250610-1157tpv: Large-scale Ct=12.69, Ultra-purified Ct=17.44, ΔCt=4.75. VB250610-1162rmu: Large-scale Ct=11.06, Ultra-purified Ct=17.33, ΔCt=6.27. WT Control Ct shown at ~25 (red dashed line).

content_blocks.title: Fold Change Analysis
content_blocks.content: Approximate fold drop in tRNA delivery (Ultra vs Large-scale): VB240514-1548ggn: ~130x reduction; VB250610-1157tpv: ~27x reduction; VB250610-1162rmu: ~77x reduction. Note: Fold change calculated as 2^(ΔCt).

content_blocks.title: RNA QC Gel Electrophoresis
content_blocks.content: 1kb DNA ladder with RNA samples from all conditions. Lanes 1-14: (1-2) AAV9L VB240514-1548ggn duplicates, (3-4) AAV9MP VB240514-1548ggn duplicates, (5-6) AAV9L VB250610-1157tpv duplicates, (7-8) AAV9MP VB250610-1157tpv duplicates, (9-10) AAV9L VB250610-1162rmu duplicates, (11-12) AAV9MP VB250610-1162rmu duplicates, (13-14) Calu6 WT duplicates. Clear RNA bands visible around 1kb region for all samples, confirming successful RNA extraction.

content_blocks.title: Complete RNA QC Dataset
content_blocks.content: Full dataset with 14 samples: VB240514-1548ggn large-scale (166 ng/ul, Ct=10.078; 129 ng/ul, Ct=10.090), ultra-purified (303 ng/ul, Ct=17.786; 325 ng/ul, Ct=16.425). VB250610-1157tpv large-scale (162 ng/ul, Ct=12.396; 236 ng/ul, Ct=12.978), ultra-purified (226 ng/ul, Ct=18.138; 340 ng/ul, Ct=16.733). VB250610-1162rmu large-scale (214 ng/ul, Ct=11.517; 216 ng/ul, Ct=10.611), ultra-purified (257 ng/ul, Ct=17.092; 411 ng/ul, Ct=17.567). Calu6 WT controls (227 ng/ul, Ct=24.682; 367 ng/ul, Ct=24.789). All samples 50ul volume.

key_findings: AAV9 vector transduction experiments performed in Calu-6 lung cancer cell line (ATCC, passage 3) at MOI=5E+6
Three different p53-related AAV9 constructs tested: VB240514-1548ggn, VB250610-1157tpv, VB250610-1162rmu
Each construct produced in two formats: large-scale (AAV9L) and ultra-purified medium scale (AAV9MP)
Western blot analysis shows strong p53 protein expression from large-scale preparations but minimal expression from ultra-purified preparations at 72h post-transduction
Brightfield microscopy shows more cell debris with non-purified virus compared to ultra-purified virus

RNA extraction and qPCR analysis (Ct values) demonstrates 27-130x reduction in transgene RNA delivery with ultra-purified vectors: VB240514-1548ggn (~130x), VB250610-1157tpv (~27x), VB250610-1162rmu (~77x)
ΔCt between large-scale and ultra-purified ranges from 4.75 to 7.02 cycles
Successful RNA extraction confirmed by gel electrophoresis showing intact RNA bands around 1kb for all samples
Controls included: Calu6 WT untransduced cells (Ct ~24.7), G418 selection (2000ug/ml), and positive control samples
All experiments performed with biological duplicates showing consistent results
